name: Pizza Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Mozzarella Cheese, Part Skim Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw dough if necessary; roll it into a 14x24-inch rectangle about 1/4-inch thick.
2. Brown ground beef or turkey in a pan. Stir in remaining ingredients.
3. Spoon filling evenly onto dough, slightly pressing the filling into the dough.
4. Roll dough lengthwise like a jelly roll and cut into 24 1-inch slices.
5. Treat two rimmed cookie sheets with nonstick spray; lay slices about an inch apart on the sheets.
6. Preheat oven to 400°F. Let roll-ups sit for 10 minutes.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool roll-ups and freeze in 4 1-gallon bags, 6 per bag.
8. Slip a 1-quart bag with 1 cup spaghetti sauce into each bag of Pizza Roll-Ups.
9. To prepare, thaw roll-ups and warm them in a preheated 400°F oven for 10 minutes. Or put them frozen in the microwave; heat on high for about 2 minutes. Serve with warmed spaghetti sauce.
